channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NACC report concludes investigation into robodebt, leaving victims and advocates frustrated
item.description: After over a decade of issues, including the wrongful issuance of over 470,000 debts, six investigations, and $2.4 billion in compensation, the National Anti-Corruption Commission (NACC) released its ...

item.title: Hubble Observes Rare Early Breakup of Comet C/2025 K1 (ATLAS)
item.description: NASA’s Hubble Space Telescope recently made an extraordinary discovery when it captured the early breakup of comet C/2025 K1 (ATLAS), just days after it began disintegrating. The observation was entir...

item.title: Rhoda Roberts: Celebrated Indigenous cultural leader who transformed Australia’s arts and storytelling
item.description: Rhoda Roberts, a Bundjalung Widjabul Wiyebal elder and one of Australia’s most influential Indigenous cultural figures, has died aged 66. Throughout her life, Roberts was a passionate advocate for Abo...

item.title: Yassi Pressman inspires women with message of strength and unity for Women’s Month
item.description: Filipina actress, singer, and entrepreneur Yassi Pressman joined the celebration of Women’s Month by sharing an empowering message for women everywhere. In her message, Yassi reminded everyone, especi...

item.title: President Samia supports children at Kikombo Children’s Home during Eid
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has shown her care for vulnerable children by donating Eid gifts to the National Kikombo Children’s Home. On March 20, 2026, the gifts were handed over by Dodoma Regional...

item.title: Cleric Paul Enenche praises Governor Otti for the remarkable transformation in Abia State
item.description: Paul Enenche, the Senior Pastor of Dunamis International Gospel Centre, recently commended Governor Alex Otti of Abia State for his remarkable efforts in transforming the state. Enenche, who was in Um...

item.title: Amit Shah's Intervention Saves NR Congress-BJP Alliance for Puducherry Elections 2026
item.description: In the run-up to the Puducherry elections in 2026, a phone call from Union Home Minister Amit Shah played a crucial role in saving the alliance between the NR Congress and BJP. According to sources, t...

item.title: Exploring Life, Migration, and Spiritual Themes in Iftikhar Arif’s Poetry
item.description: Iftikhar Arif’s poetry represents a unique confluence of passion, history, and spiritual introspection. His work is deeply rooted in personal experiences yet transforms them into universal reflections...

item.title: NDP leadership candidates split over whether new leader should rush to sit in Parliament
item.description: Four of the five federal New Democratic Party leadership candidates say they do not intend to rush into the House of Commons if they win the race, emphasizing that their immediate priority is rebuildi...

item.title: Jaoko Oburu shares a rare photo of his wife during Eid festivities
item.description: Jaoko Oburu, the son of Siaya Senator Oburu Oginga, has recently given the public a rare glimpse of his wife, Moureen, during the Eid-ul-Fitr celebrations. The couple, who have kept a low profile, wer...

item.title: Agriculture Department extends fuel subsidy to support fisherfolk amid rising oil prices
item.description: The Department of Agriculture–Bureau of Fisheries and Aquatic Resources (DA-BFAR) announced that it will continue its fuel assistance program to support Filipino fisherfolk facing the impact of climbi...

item.title: Tanzania to host first ever Miss World Tanzania Grand Finale on April 19
item.description: Tanzania is preparing for a landmark cultural event as the inaugural Miss World Tanzania Grand Finale is scheduled for April 19, 2026, at the Super Dome in Dar es Salaam. The announcement was made by ...

item.title: PM Shehbaz urges public and government to conserve energy amid shortage
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has called upon both the government and the people of Pakistan to act responsibly during the ongoing energy shortage. Speaking through Petroleum Minister Ali Pervaiz Mali...

item.title: Moshi Gears Up for the Kilimanjaro International Marathon 2026
item.description: Moshi is buzzing with excitement as preparations reach the final stages for the Kilimanjaro Premium Lager International Marathon 2026, set to take place this Sunday. Minister for Information, Culture,...

item.title: Justin Timberlake Struggles During Sobriety Tests After Drink-Driving Arrest
item.description: Footage has been released showing Justin Timberlake struggling during a sobriety test after his drink-driving arrest in June 2024. The pop star, arrested in Sag Harbor, New York, was pulled over by po...

item.title: Decoupling Economic Growth from Emissions: A Practical Path to Net Zero
item.description: Decoupling refers to the process of separating economic growth from greenhouse gas emissions, allowing economies to expand without increasing their carbon footprint. Evidence shows that countries repr...

item.title: Why Kenyan journalists keep working in newsrooms despite low salaries and burnout
item.description: This article looks at a new study that digs into why many Kenyan journalists are choosing to remain in newsrooms even when the salaries are low, working conditions are tough, and burnout is increasing...

item.title: BARMM Leaders Promote Peace and Interfaith Unity During Eid'l Fitr Celebrations
item.description: Local leaders in the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) emphasized the importance of peace, interfaith unity, and sustainable development during Eid’l Fitr celebrations on March 2...

item.title: Canadian poll shows majority think Israelis face more prejudice than Palestinians amid war with Iran
item.description: A new survey conducted by Leger for the Association for Canadian Studies suggests that a majority of Canadians believe Israelis are more likely to face prejudice than Palestinians or Iranians as a res...

item.title: Sloan’s Andrew Scott receives NSCAD Life Fellow recognition for his contributions to music and art
item.description: Andrew Scott, drummer of the long-running Canadian rock band Sloan, is being honoured by his former school, NSCAD University, as a Life Fellow — an award given to individuals who have made a lasting i...
